resources.string:
Because Gkeys was installed from an APK (not the Play Store), Android blocks “Display over other apps” until you opt in.

1. Tap Continue to open Gkeys app info
2. Tap ⋮ (top-right menu) → Allow restricted settings
3. Confirm with your PIN or fingerprint
4. Return here and tap Allow display over other apps again

The security warning is normal for self-installed apps you trust.
Tap ⋮ → Allow restricted settings, then come back and try again
Turn on Allow display over other apps for Gkeys
Installed from APK? If Android blocks access, open App info → ⋮ → Allow restricted settings first.
